titleStmt.title: SII 25.75: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 75. (A.R. No. 75 of 1908.) VEḌĀL, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Nīlakaṇṭhēśvara temple.

p.hi: Bhūpatirya, son of Dēvarāya Śaka 1329: 1408 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records the grant of sarvamānya-iṟaiyili lands alongwith its income from taxes in Pūdēri in Poṉṉūṟ-paṟṟu by a certain Ārkkārmuṟ Sembandai Tuṇaiyirundāṉ Virupparāya-Kāṅgayar to provide for the Tuṇaiyirundāṉ-śandhi evidently instituted by the donor, after his own name, and for burning two perpetual lamps to god Kaṟaikaṇṭīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār and to meet the expenses of providing food-offerings, a perpetual lamp and the repairs of the deity Payyaga-piḷḷaiyār in the village Viḍāl in Poṉṉūṟ-paṟṟu in Śiṅgapura-nāḍu in Veṇkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. This was signed by Virupparāyak-Koṅgayar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran Arirāyavibhāṭan bhāṣaikkut tappuvarā
yarakaṇṭan muvarāyarakaṇṭan śrīvīradevarāya śrīmatu kumārar bhūpatirāya Uṭaiyar
pṛthivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa kālattuc cellāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 2 10 9- ṉ
meṟcellāniṉṟa sarvvajituvaruṣattu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu caturddaśiyum viyāḻa
kkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ Ārkkārmuṟ cempantai tuṇaiyiruntāṉ virupparāyak kāṅkayar jaya
ṅ koṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟak koṭṭattuc ciṅkapura nāṭṭu poṉṉūṟpaṟṟil viṭāl
Uṭaiyār kaṟaikkaṇṭīśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟkut tuṇaiyiruntāṉ cantikkum tiruṉuntāviḷakku
iraṇṭukkum poyya(ā)ka piḷḷaiyāṟku tiruppaṇḍārattukkum tiruṉuntāviḷakku Oṉṟukkun tiruppaṇi
kkum candrādityavaraiyum cellap poṉṉūṟ paṟṟup pūteriyellaiyil Uṭpaṭa kiḻpāṟkellai
kaḷarukkum taṇṭukaraikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellaiProbably ilaṅkaya teva • is the intended reading.Ilaṅketevaṉentalerivāyiṟ tiruccūla
sthāpaṉattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi viṭārellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapā
ṟkellai neṟkuṉṟat tellaiyilantip puṟavaṭakkut teṟkum Āka Iṉṉāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nilamuṅ ki
ḻ ṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ellai muṟṟun tām veṇṭum payiṟcey
tu koṇṭu kaṭamai poṉvari kāṇikkaiyupātiyum pala poṉvaṟkamum pala nelvaṟkamumippaṟṟai
ṉokkik koḷḷum pala varikaḷum pala Upātikaḷumuṭpaṭa sarvvamānnya Iṟaiyiliyākat tiruṉāmattu
kkāṇiyākac candrātittavaraiyuñ cellaviṭṭom Ivai viruparāyakkāṅkayar Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 25.75 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
